content: I am a second-year PhD student(2018-) of Computer Science and Engineering at HKUST, advised by Prof. Chiew-Lan Tai at Vision and Graphics Group. I am also working closely with Prof. Long Quan and Prof. Hongbo Fu. Prior to HKUST, I received my BSc in Electronic Engenieering from Beijing Normal University.
